name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Small Bag #️⃣M46815
Exclusive global launch of authentic counter-style merchandise! This item features French custom craftsmanship, dynamic chip serial number, original factory fabric, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
For comparison, please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
18 x 12.5 x 8 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Zipper closure with S-lock
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half strap length: 48.0 cm
Half strap adjustable to: 58.0 cm
Handles: Single handle, removable
Made in France
